rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Temporily Set Aside Dismissal In Order To Hear Pltffs Motion For Order To Deft To Release Statutory Relocation Payment Back To Pltff

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. SUSAN SNIPES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement And For Order Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 5, 2016, Line 5. PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement And For Order Of Possession Hearing Required to address overpayment. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN FERMER VS. CALVIN JHUNJHUWALA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 5, 2016, Line 6. DEFENDANT CALVIN JHUNJHUWALA, EVAN SEDIGH, NATHAN RANGO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Based on the allegations in the complaint, which must be taken as true, complaint is not premature. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH YEE VS. CARLOS MENDOZA ET AL
